description: Generate the TLAPS proof spec and discharge it with tlapm (layer 3: AXIOMATIC certificate)
rules: read-only on the target — writes only the structured report into RECORD_STORE
fail-closed: a missing prover binary is status=fail (missing_tool), never a silent skip or pass
deterministic structured JSON out — the report IS the certificate the ledger records
usage: Set TARGET_BLUEPRINT; optional TLAPM_TIMEOUT (default 240s). Output: backbone_tlaps.json {status,obligations,error}; proof artifacts under tlaps_work/.
limitation: Discharges the TypeInvariant induction (Init + per-transition + stutter). Encodes the module-vs-filename generator gotcha; never name a transition t_next (lemma collision with Next).
